suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to error handling conventions: Use toast notifications (useToast/showToast) for user-facing feedback on failed API mutations, rather than console.error. Toast is now the established pattern for client-side error feedback in this project.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature fix-clear-splits-and-quality replaced console.error calls with showToast() in AccountsClient.tsx and TransactionsClient.tsx. AGENTS.md currently says 'error boundaries in React (show user-friendly messages)' but doesn't mention the toast notification pattern that is now the standard approach for API mutation errors.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md now documents inArray() convention which was added as part of this fix
rejectedObservations.reason: Already applied in prior round's suggested updates. The convention is now codified in AGENTS.md. No further action needed.
